recommendations.title: The Zodiac
recommendations.overview: An elusive serial killer known as the Zodiac terrorizes the San Francisco Bay in the late 1960s, while detectives aim to stop him before he claims more victims. Based on a true story.

recommendations.title: Citizen X
recommendations.overview: Based on the true story of a Russian serial killer who, over many years, claimed victim to over 50 people. His victims were mostly under the age of 17. In what was then a communists state, the police investigations were hampered by bureaucracy, incom

recommendations.title: Believe Me: The Abduction of Lisa McVey
recommendations.overview: On the night she plans on taking her own life, 17-year-old 'Lisa McVey' is kidnapped and finds herself fighting to stay alive and is raped. She manages to talk her attacker into releasing her, but when she returns home, no one believes her story exce

recommendations.title: John Doe: Vigilante
recommendations.overview: When John Doe is convicted of being a vigilante serial killer, a vigilante group named 'Speak for the Dead' emerges in support of John's cause—elevating the debate about justice versus vengeance.

recommendations.title: The Girl Who Escaped: The Kara Robinson Story
recommendations.overview: Based on a true story. 15-year-old Kara Robinson was kidnapped, assaulted and held captive for 18 hours. With her survival instincts kicking in, she plots a daring escape from the serial killer and leads police to his apartment.

recommendations.title: 10 Rillington Place
recommendations.overview: The story of British serial killer John Christie, who committed most or all of his crimes in the titular terraced house, and the miscarriage of justice involving Timothy Evans.

recommendations.title: While the City Sleeps
recommendations.overview: Newspaper men compete against each other to find a serial killer dubbed "The Lipstick Killer".

recommendations.title: Kalifornia
recommendations.overview: A journalist duo go on a tour of serial killer murder sites with two companions, unaware that one of them is a serial killer himself.

recommendations.title: Ratsasan
recommendations.overview: A serial killer is murdering school girls, and a newbie cop has to track him down before the victim count increases.

recommendations.title: Satan's Little Helper
recommendations.overview: A naïve young boy unknowingly becomes the pawn of a serial killer.
